name: Star Map 25 — 50 Agent Projects
description: Fifty implementation projects assigned to content_generator_agent, learning_agent, analytics_agent. See docs/STARMAP_25_50_PROJECTS.md.

projects.description: Validate star_map_25.json schema — id, name, host_star, segmentum, planets, life_bearing, info, point_value, icon, lore, index
Add coordinates (x,y,z or ra,dec,dist) to each point for 3D map placement
Add tags per point (fortress, legion_homeworld, traitor) for filtering and badges
Add unlock_requirement (optional) — e.g. investigate Terra first; document in data
Extended lore paragraphs — lore_long (2–4 sentences) per point for Read more
Canon links — lexicanum_url or wh40k_wiki per point for Learn more
Segmentum metadata — data/segmentums.json or segmentums block: name, color, fortress_point_id
Point icons as assets — emoji or sprite per icon; fallback icon list
Localization keys — name_key, info_key, lore_key for i18n; en as default
Version and changelog in star_map_25.json; expose via API for What's new
GET /api/star-map/25/point/<id> — single-point detail; 404 if not found
GET /api/star-map/25?segmentum=Ultima — filter by segmentum query param
GET /api/star-map/25/segmentums — list segmentums with point count and fortress id
POST investigate idempotency — same points_earned if already investigated; no double award
Rate limit investigate — max N per user per hour; return 429 with Retry-After
GET /api/star-map/25/leaderboard — top users by total_points_earned or count
ETag / If-None-Match for map — return 304 when unchanged
Bulk status — POST body user_ids[] for multiple users (admin/analytics)
OpenAPI spec for Star Map 25 — docs/api/star-map-25.yaml
GET /api/star-map/25/health — writable, readable, last_modified of investigations file
Group cards by Segmentum on monitor — Solar, Obscurus, Pacificus, Tempestus, Ultima
Responsive grid — 25 cols → 5 on tablet, 2–3 on mobile
Read full lore expand — modal or inline for lore_long
Filter by segmentum/tags — dropdown or chips (Show only Ultima, Fortress only)
Sort options — by name, point_value, segmentum, investigated first/last
Keyboard navigation — arrow keys and Enter to focus and activate Investigate
Share progress — copy link or image (e.g. 12/25 investigated)
Print-friendly view — CSS print styles; hide nav, show grid and progress
Dark/light theme toggle — CSS variables; persist in localStorage
Loading skeletons — 25 card-shaped skeletons instead of Loading…
Three.js scene with 25 spheres — one per point; position by segmentum/coordinates
Orbit controls and zoom — camera orbit, zoom to point on click
Labels on hover/click — point name and Investigate (CSS2DRenderer or sprite)
Segmentum colors — color spheres or connectors by segmentum
Focus on point — from grid card, zoom 3D view to that point
Starmap25 shop category — boosters (2× 1h/6h/24h), +30m/+2h gametime
Starmap25 trophies in shop — Terra, Segmentum Clear, Full Clear, Lore Master
Apply booster to investigate — 2× booster doubles point_value for that investigation
Shop deep link — From monitor, Get boosters links to /shop?category=starmap25
Game points display on monitor — current user game_points next to Total points earned
Trophy Terra — award when first investigation is terra_sol; show on Trophies page
Trophy Segmentum Clear — all points in one segmentum; one trophy per segmentum
Trophy Full Clear (25/25) — award when investigated_count === 25
Trophy Lore Master — all 25 lore entries unlocked
Daily/weekly quests — Star Map Scout (1/day), Segmentum Explorer (5/week); reward on investigate
Log investigate events — logs/starmap25_investigations.jsonl (user_id, point_id, ts)
Agent tool get_star_map_25_status — MCP/agent API: user_id → investigated_ids, total_points_earned
Agent tool investigate_point — agent can call investigate (with auth); idempotent
Generator Assign 25 includes starmap — e.g. expand lore for point X in daily assign
Dashboard widget — Star Map 25: X/25 investigated, Y points earned; link to monitor
